creator: avayaduggu93@gmail.com
text:
In other words, there could be some pretty cool and wonderful dads in your life — ones who would appreciate being acknowledged on Father's Day. Beneath are a few ideas for what to these. 
Let someone else get him the monogrammed tongs-and-spatula set. The awesome "smoking gun" from Breville ($100) takes backyard barbecuing to a different level by infusing food with natural applewood or hickory smoke. 
These gifts are the perfect way to honor every type of Father. From the outdoor adventurer, the fearless traveler, the pampered businessman or the big kid that will never grow up, this year’s gift guide features some of my favorite items. I personally use some of these in my travels and would love the ability to try out the rest. http://fathersdayguide.com/when-is-fathers-day-2017-date/
